g.text: T+0ns | Wire: Electrical signal arrives at NIC port
T+50ns | PHY: Signal decoded, clock recovered
T+80ns | MAC: Frame validated, DMA initiated
T+180ns | DMA: Packet written to host RAM
T+185ns | Poll: CPU detects new descriptor (cache hit)
T+285ns | Cache: First packet access (cache miss penalty)
T+500ns | Done: Data delivered to application
